query: SELECT as2.id, as2.agent_id, as2.skill_id, as2.awake_tier, as2.use_count, as2.installed_slot, as2.acquired_at FROM agent_skills as2 WHERE as2.agent_id = 1 ORDER BY as2.acquired_at DESC LIMIT 20;
